summary: Completed comprehensive testing of personal equity momentum trading system. All core features working correctly including dashboard metrics, watchlist management with live market data, position sizing calculations, trade logging with full lifecycle, analytics with charts, and settings management.
passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with all metrics (Account Size, Total P&L, Win Rate, Profit Factor, Avg R, Open Positions)
Watchlist add ticker dialog with search and validation works
Watchlist refresh data fetches live market data from yfinance (5-10 second delay expected)
Position Sizer % Risk tab calculates shares correctly based on account size, risk %, entry and stop prices
Position Sizer Fixed Dollar tab calculates shares correctly
Trade Log new trade creation with all fields (ticker, side, entry, shares, stop, strategy, setup, notes)
Trade Log close trade with exit price and automatic P&L calculation
Trade Log status filters (ALL/OPEN/CLOSED) work correctly
Analytics page displays metrics and handles empty state appropriately
Settings page account size and risk % updates work
Navigation sidebar works correctly for all pages
All backend API endpoints working: POST /api/watchlist, POST /api/trades, POST /api/trades/{id}/close, GET /api/analytics, PUT /api/settings
yfinance integration working for live market data

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 13 API endpoints tested and working
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components, navigation, forms, and integrations working
